summary: Iteration 2 — Booking feature (POST /api/booking + BookingDialog frontend modal) fully verified end-to-end. All 15 backend pytest tests pass (6 new booking tests + 9 existing contact/health kept as regression). All 43 frontend E2E checks pass (Events section headline/pricing/reassurance line, dialog open via 2 CTAs, all 10 fields + 8 add-on toggles present with correct data-testids, empty-submit validation toast + no POST, filled submit posts to /api/booking (200 with id), WhatsApp popup opens with wa.me/918328830796 + prefilled details, dialog auto-close + form reset, close-button + overlay-click both close dialog, GET /api/booking top item matches submission, existing /api/contact POST still 200 as regression).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: booking POST + list uses the same _send_email helper and MongoDB serialization pattern as contact — consistent. Good.
BookingDialog.jsx (~423 lines) is close to the 700-line threshold and still readable; if more fields get added later, consider splitting the add-ons into its own component.

Events.jsx: the bottom 'Check Availability' button uses data-testid `hero-cta-contact-events` (FARM.heroCtaContact + '-events'). This suffix collides with `nav-link-events` when matched via suffix selectors. Not a functional bug but worth renaming to e.g. `events-book-cta-bottom` for testing clarity.

BookingDialog.jsx: `Number(form.members) < 1` guard is fine, but empty string coerces to 0 which the current check already catches. duration_hours accepts any string on backend — consider tightening to numeric on backend too.
BookingDialog.jsx: on API error the toast is generic ('Something went wrong…'). Consider surfacing the server error detail when available for easier debugging.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST-prefixed bookings via pytest and 1 'TEST Playwright Booker' booking via UI in MongoDB `bookings` collection; also 1 'TEST Regression' contact submission. All identifiable by TEST prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking backend at /api/booking (POST + GET with limit) and BookingDialog frontend fully covered by /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py::TestBooking and by frontend E2E in this iteration. Public URL: https://panda-farm-house.preview.emergentagent.com. Note: WhatsApp opens in new tab via window.open; verified via Playwright popup event (URL confirmed to include 918328830796 and prefilled fields). When writing frontend selectors for the second Events CTA, use exact testid `hero-cta-contact-events` — do NOT use suffix `$='-events'` because nav-link-events would match instead.
